content.situation: 家长在超市结账时，想用移动支付完成付款，向收银员确认是否支持该方式。
content.speakerText: I'd like to pay with Google Pay. ______?
content.speakerTextCn: 我想用谷歌支付，可以吗？

options: I don't know how to use it
You need to sign here first

content.hint: 回答支持移动支付时，常用动词是 tap，搭配 your phone
content.knowledgePoint: 移动支付方式的确认表达

content.situation: 家长在便利店结账，收银员询问支付方式，家长想用银行卡但不确定是否支持。
content.speakerText: Can I pay with debit card? ______?
content.speakerTextCn: 我可以用借记卡付款吗？可以吗？

blanks.answer: Of course, just insert or swipe
options: Of course, just insert or swipe
You need to call your bank
We don't have any cards here

content.hint: 银行卡支付常用表达：insert（插卡）或 swipe（刷卡）
content.knowledgePoint: 银行卡支付方式的动词使用

content.situation: 家长在药店结账，收银员问是否用电子支付，家长想确认是否支持支付宝。

blanks.answer: Yes, just scan the QR code
options: Yes, just scan the QR code
I'm not sure where to find it
You need to download an app

content.hint: 支付宝支付通常通过扫描二维码完成，动词用 scan
content.knowledgePoint: 国际电子支付方式的回应表达
